general.name: Exact Match
general.dork: site:facebook.com OR site:instagram.com OR site:twitter.com OR site:linkedin.com {{.Name}}
general.description: Checks major social platforms for exact name matches.

files.name: PDF Fragments
files.description: Finds resumes, lists, and documents containing the name.

files.name: Excel Leaks
files.description: Finds spreadsheets (often leaked user lists) with the name.

files.name: Word Documents
files.description: Finds Word documents mentioning the name.

files.name: Text/Logs
files.description: Finds plain text files and server logs.

government.name: Finnish Business (YTJ)
government.description: Checks Finnish business and trade registers for company connections.

government.name: Finnish Public Records
government.description: Searches official meeting minutes and documents from Finnish institutions.

government.name: Finnish News Media
government.dork: site:yle.fi OR site:hs.fi OR site:iltalehti.fi OR site:is.fi {{.Name}}
government.description: Checks major Finnish news outlets for mentions.

leaks.name: Data Leaks (Pastebin)
leaks.description: Searches text storage sites for leaked credentials or data dumps.
